text.title: Writing Design Documents Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Writing Design Documents end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: enumerate-decisions
step.action: List required architectural decisions; allocate AD-X ids.

step.name: alternatives
step.action: For each AD list ≥1 alternative + tradeoff + chosen-option.

step.name: file-and-data
step.action: Author file structure + data models + diagrams.

step.name: trace-coverage
step.action: Verify every FR-X is covered by at least one AD or module.
